DESCRIPTION: Collector of Revenue's city block number.
LABEL: Collector of Revenue City Block
NAME: ColCityBlock

DESCRIPTION: Collector of Revenue's parcel number, is only unique within a single City Block parent.
LABEL: Collector of Revenue's Parcel Number
NAME: ColParcel

DESCRIPTION: An unformatted version of the Collector of Revenue's Parcel ID numbering scheme. This is, essentially, the parcel numbering scheme used across many departments to refer to a parcel, pre-2021 parcel numbering scheme update.
LABEL: Collector of Revenue Parcel ID
NAME: ColParcelId

DESCRIPTION: A numbering schema originally introduced to aid in the handling of condominiums. DEPRECATED.
LABEL: HANDLE
NAME: HANDLE

DESCRIPTION: Highest house number that can be used to reference this parcel on its primary street.
LABEL: Highest Address Number
NAME: HighAddrNum

DESCRIPTION: Address Suffix for the HighAddrNum. Usually a letter for "unit", an F or R for Front or Rear, or a directionality letter indicating placement within the parcel's geography.
LABEL: Highest Address Suffix
NAME: HighAddrSuf

DESCRIPTION: Lowest house number that can be used to reference this parcel on its primary street.
LABEL: Lower Address Number
NAME: LowAddrNum

DESCRIPTION: Address Suffix for the LowAddrNum. Usually a letter for "unit", an F or R for Front or Rear, or a directionality letter indicating placement within the parcel's geography.
LABEL: Lowest Address Suffix
NAME: LowAddrSuf

DESCRIPTION: An unformatted parcel ID in the schema introduced by the Assessor's office in 2021.
LABEL: Parcel ID
NAME: ParcelId

DESCRIPTION: Main address used for parcel within city records.
LABEL: Site Address
NAME: SITEADDR

DESCRIPTION: Unit number for parcel if in use.
LABEL: Standard Unit Number
NAME: StdUnitNum

DESCRIPTION: Currently only includes "SE" or "W" when present.
LABEL: Street Suffix Direction
NAME: StSufDir
